hero.headline: Tabletop Without Borders
hero.subheadline: Bringing the magic of game night to your screen, wherever you are! Because every great adventure starts with your turn.

community-showcase.description: A rotating gallery of standout community-created packs and modules.

developer-api.title: Developer API
developer-api.description: Integrate your own tools and services with Thunderbird's open API.

card-animation-pack.title: Card Animation Pack
card-animation-pack.description: Bring your cards to life with dynamic animations and particle effects.

virtual-tabletop.title: Virtual Tabletop
virtual-tabletop.description: A new mode optimized for RPGs and board games with grid support.

features.heading: Built for Serious Tabletop Creators
features.subheading: A modular, community-first platform where publishing, discovery, and cross-format support are designed to scale with your game ecosystem.

creator-workflow.title: Ship Packs Faster With Guided Publishing
paragraphs: Build and validate complete expansion packs in one place with predictable metadata, clean upload paths, and moderation-ready submissions.
From card art to deck manifests, Thunderbird keeps your release workflow consistent so you spend less time fixing format issues and more time creating.
creator-workflow.imageAlt: Visual editor and publishing workflow preview

community-discovery.title: Highlight What Your Players Actually Want
paragraphs: Surface featured packs, stable releases, and experimental modules with searchable tags that help players find the right content quickly.
Alternating feed-style showcases make it easy to spot new updates while preserving context around category, quality state, and compatibility.
community-discovery.imageAlt: Community showcase feed with featured modules

cross-game-flexibility.title: Support TCG, Party, and Logic-Based Formats
paragraphs: Thunderbird supports both image-heavy and text-first game systems, so creators can publish anything from premium card art packs to lightweight social decks.
A unified submission pipeline keeps standards clear while still allowing very different content styles and gameplay structures.
cross-game-flexibility.imageAlt: Virtual tabletop environment for multiple game formats

donation.heading: Support the Community
donation.body: Love Thunderbird? Help us keep the magic alive by supporting the development of new features, assets, and community tools.

modal.subtitle: Bring your card game to life!
modal.directFlattenedAssetsBody: Upload pre-rendered, high-resolution 2.5" x 3.5" (734x1024px) portrait aspect ratio images. Best for cards with complex baked-in design and custom borders.
modal.dynamicCompositionBody: Upload Raw Images (PNG or JPG) and a Data Manifest (JSON or CSV). Best for cards with modular elements, such as separate art, text, and icon layers.
modal.partyAndLogicSystemsBody: Upload standardized text-only expansions with a validated deck.* manifest in JSON or CSV formats. Best for games like Cards Against Humanity, Secret Hitler, and other logic-based card games without unique visual assets.
modal.disclaimerLineOne: These submissions shall be reviewed by the Thunderbird Committee and Community Moderators to ensure asset integrity and compliance with project standards.
modal.disclaimerLineTwoPrefix: By using our website services, we are not liable for intellectual property disputes arising from submitted content. You must certify that you own these assets or have the right to distribute them.
